name: cardio-ml-aws
description: Infraestrutura AWS (CDK) e Lambda para o projeto Cardio ML

scripts.lambda:setup: cd src/lambda && uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt && uv pip install -e ../../.. --no-deps
scripts.lambda:test: cd src/lambda && uv run --no-project pytest handler_test.py -v
scripts.lambda:run: cd src/lambda && uv run --no-project python -c "from handler import handler; print(handler({'source': 'aws.events'}, None))"
